# Phase-07 — Streaming & Real-Time Analytics

> Design low-latency streaming and real-time analytics systems.
>
> Suggested timeline: **Weeks 26-29**

Each prompt below instructs GitHub Copilot to generate exactly one standalone Markdown
chapter with all 50 mandatory sections (Azure-primary, ~60/30/10 Azure/OSS/AWS+GCP).

| # | Prompt | Generates | Study time |
|---|--------|-----------|------------|
| 01 | [Streaming Fundamentals](01_Streaming_Fundamentals.prompt.md) | `Streaming_Fundamentals.md` | 60 min + 3h |
| 02 | [Apache Kafka](02_Apache_Kafka.prompt.md) | `Apache_Kafka.md` | 90 min + 6h |
| 03 | [Azure Event Hubs and Stream Analytics](03_Azure_Event_Hubs_and_Stream_Analytics.prompt.md) | `Azure_Event_Hubs_and_Stream_Analytics.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 04 | [Apache Flink](04_Apache_Flink.prompt.md) | `Apache_Flink.md` | 75 min + 5h |
| 05 | [Spark Structured Streaming](05_Spark_Structured_Streaming.prompt.md) | `Spark_Structured_Streaming.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 06 | [Change Data Capture](06_Change_Data_Capture.prompt.md) | `Change_Data_Capture.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 07 | [Real-Time Analytics: ClickHouse and Druid](07_Real_Time_Analytics_ClickHouse_and_Druid.prompt.md) | `Real_Time_Analytics.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 08 | [Streaming Patterns and Delivery Semantics](08_Streaming_Patterns_and_Delivery_Semantics.prompt.md) | `Streaming_Patterns.md` | 45 min + 3h |

## How to run
Open a prompt file in VS Code and run it with GitHub Copilot (agent mode), or reference it
from Copilot Chat. It will produce the corresponding `.md` chapter listed above.
